title: RF elements AS-2-14 - Array Sector Antenna 2.4 GHz, 14 dBi
description: The new Array Sector series are superior patch array antennas optimized for excellent performance in sectorial coverage and dense cluster applications. Sector dualpolarization antenna Array Sector 2-14 from the manufacturer RF Elements operating in the 2.4 GHz band with 14 dBi gain and a beam angle of 112° . Array Sector Antennas have integrated BackShield - patented frequency-selective surfaces attenuating azimuthal side lobes and back radiation significantly improving the co-location… The gain of Array Sector antennas remains very stable across an ultra-wide range of frequencies 2400 - 2484 MHz. VSWR values are excellent across the whole useful spectrum for maximum power delivered from a radio to the antenna Array Sector Antennas are compatible with all major radios with coaxial connectors (check datasheet for complete list). Array Sector Antennas also feature removable cover protecting the SMA connectors, another feature introduced by RF elements® that became an industry standard RF elements - StationBox S, StationBox S CARRIER CLASS, RockShield Ubiquiti - Rocket M2, Rocket 2ac Prism MikroTik - BaseBox, NetBox, NetMetal TP-Link - Pharos WBS210 Cambium Networks - ePMP 1000AP a CSM Antenna Holder (mast clamps, screws) Plastic unit cover
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,6 F/B ratio [dB] 21 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 35 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 21 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 112 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 14 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA male Physical characteristics Designed for mast diameter [mm] 40 up to 80 Wind load [km/h] 160 Protection class IP55 Purpose Outdoor Material Aluminum, UV stabilized ABS plastic, Stainless steel Operating temperature [°C] 35 up to 60 Weight [kg] 3,7 Width [mm] 160 Height [mm] 804 Depth [mm] 63
